title: Implementation Manifest — Web Graph Integration
description: Records all files created, modified, and deleted during Phase 4 build. Covers Step A (CLI removal) and Step B (spec-artifact DAG tab).

changes.reason: Remove monitor import and dispatch; replace with deprecation stub; update USAGE string.
CLI dashboard command removed — web dashboard is the sole monitoring surface.
CLI renderer removed together with monitor command.
Test file for deleted module removed to prevent broken import errors.
Expose driftPhases[] as string array in readAitriState return value so graphNormalizer can do per-phase drift detection.
New reader: reads 01_REQUIREMENTS.json and 03_TEST_CASES.json, strips verbose fields, returns {frs, tcs} for dashboard.json.
Import and call readSpecArtifacts; add specArtifacts field to per-project data object.
Add cytoscape ^3.30.4 and cytoscape-dagre ^2.5.0 as devDependencies (bundled by Vite).
Pure function normalizeSpecArtifacts(specArtifacts, aitriState) → {nodes, edges} for Cytoscape.
7th dashboard tab: lazy-loads Cytoscape+dagre on first activation, renders the spec artifact DAG with tap-to-tooltip.
Legend chip strip: maps node color → status and shape → artifact kind (FR rect / TC diamond).
Add GRAPH tab identifier, import GraphTab, add graph.ts button with badge, add Graph panel in main.
Add graph-tab, graph-legend, graph-tooltip CSS blocks using existing Hub design tokens.
Unit tests for readSpecArtifacts — TC-014h, TC-014f, TC-014e.
Unit tests for normalizeSpecArtifacts — TC-015h, TC-015f, TC-015e.
